papers.title: Industrial reliability testing of transistor gate dielectrics
papers.summary: Nature Electronics, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01644-x This Perspective examines how industry benchmarks the performance of gate dielectrics in silicon transistors, how to collect and analyse gate dielectric reliability data to extract meaningful and industry-relevant conclusions, and how to apply this to two-dimensional transistors.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026 年 6 月 24 日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01644-x。本文这一观点文章考察了工业界如何评估硅晶体管中栅介质的性能，如何收集和分析栅介质可靠性数据以提取有意义且与工业相关的结论，以及如何将这些方法应用于二维晶体管。
papers.abstract_zh: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026 年 6 月 24 日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01644-x。本文这一观点文章考察了工业界如何评估硅晶体管中栅介质的性能，如何收集和分析栅介质可靠性数据以提取有意义且与工业相关的结论，以及如何将这些方法应用于二维晶体管。
papers.overview_cn:
Focus: 晶体管、介电材料.
What to check: 性能提升、可靠性与稳定性、与既有工艺平台的集成价值.
Context: Industrial reliability testing of transistor gate dielectrics.

papers.title: Silicon Nanostructures for Biosensing: From Field-Effect Transistors to Photonic Resonators, and the Long Road to the Clinic
papers.summary: Silicon has a unique combination of properties that makes it one of the best material choices for biosensor platforms: it is inexpensive, its native oxide is atomically smooth, its fabrication processes are CMOS-compatible and have been refined for more than three decades, and it can support many transduction mechanisms in biosensor design. Over the past thirty years, researchers and engineers have used silicon nanostructures to produce ion-sensitive transistors, ultrasensitive nanowire field-effect biosensors, refractive-index-based porous silicon films, microring photonic resonators, suspended cantilevers, luminescent quantum dots, and solid-state nanopores. These device families have demonstrated successful sensing capabilities at the single-molecule, single-virus, or sub-femtomolar level under laboratory conditions; however, they have rarely been widely deployed in clinical assays. This gap is mainly caused by several well-characterized bottlenecks: for nanowire BioFETs, device variability and Debye screening; for porous silicon, fouling, pore wetting, and surface stability; for silicon photonics, thermal drift, spectral readout, and packaging; and across all platforms, calibration, reproducibility, and validation in real biofluids. In this review, we trace the development of silicon biosensors from their early stages to their current state, search and organize the literature focusing on the three most mature platforms and a set of emerging directions, summarize and compare the performance and bottlenecks of different platforms, and argue that progress over the next decade will come primarily from integrated readout, interface engineering, and systematic benchmarking rather than from the discovery of new silicon nanostructures.
papers.abstract_cn: 硅具有一组独特的性质，使其成为生物传感器平台的最佳材料选择之一：它价格低廉，其天然氧化层具有原子级平滑表面，其制造工艺与 CMOS 兼容并已历经三十多年优化，而且它能够支持生物传感器设计中的多种换能机制。在过去三十年中，研究人员和工程师利用硅纳米结构制备了离子敏感晶体管、超灵敏纳米线场效应生物传感器、基于折射率的多孔硅薄膜、微环光子谐振器、悬臂梁、发光量子点以及固态纳米孔。这些器件家族已经在实验室条件下展示了单分子、单病毒或亚飞摩尔水平的成功传感能力；然而，它们很少被广泛部署到临床检测中。这一差距主要由若干已被充分表征的瓶颈造成：对于纳米线 BioFET，是器件变异性和 Debye 屏蔽；对于多孔硅，是污染、孔润湿和表面稳定性；对于硅光子学，是热漂移、光谱读出和封装；而对所有平台而言，则是校准、可重复性以及在真实生物流体中的验证。在本文综述中，我们追溯了硅生物传感器从早期阶段到当前状态的发展，检索并组织了聚焦于三种最成熟平台和一组新兴方向的文献，总结并比较了不同平台的性能和瓶颈，并认为未来十年的进展主要将来自集成读出、界面工程和系统性基准测试，而不是新型硅纳米结构的发现。
papers.abstract_zh: 硅具有一组独特的性质，使其成为生物传感器平台的最佳材料选择之一：它价格低廉，其天然氧化层具有原子级平滑表面，其制造工艺与 CMOS 兼容并已历经三十多年优化，而且它能够支持生物传感器设计中的多种换能机制。在过去三十年中，研究人员和工程师利用硅纳米结构制备了离子敏感晶体管、超灵敏纳米线场效应生物传感器、基于折射率的多孔硅薄膜、微环光子谐振器、悬臂梁、发光量子点以及固态纳米孔。这些器件家族已经在实验室条件下展示了单分子、单病毒或亚飞摩尔水平的成功传感能力；然而，它们很少被广泛部署到临床检测中。这一差距主要由若干已被充分表征的瓶颈造成：对于纳米线 BioFET，是器件变异性和 Debye 屏蔽；对于多孔硅，是污染、孔润湿和表面稳定性；对于硅光子学，是热漂移、光谱读出和封装；而对所有平台而言，则是校准、可重复性以及在真实生物流体中的验证。在本文综述中，我们追溯了硅生物传感器从早期阶段到当前状态的发展，检索并组织了聚焦于三种最成熟平台和一组新兴方向的文献，总结并比较了不同平台的性能和瓶颈，并认为未来十年的进展主要将来自集成读出、界面工程和系统性基准测试，而不是新型硅纳米结构的发现。

papers.title: Rapid FinFET Modelling Using an Autoencoder
papers.summary: This work presents a machine learning framework that leverages an autoencoder (AE) for the efficient modeling of FinFET. We first calibrated a BSIM-CMG model to generate a dataset of current-voltage (ID-VG) characteristics. This data was used to train an autoencoder that compresses full I-V curves into a low-dimensional latent space, which intrinsically encodes key device physics. A key innovation is the explicit incorporation of parameter such as drain to source voltage (VDS) as an input feature, enhancing the model ability to capture bias dependent variation. The trained model successfully reconstructs full I-V curves and directly extracts critical device metrics including threshold voltage (VTH), subthreshold slope (SS), and peak transconductance (gm). This approach demonstrates that data driven compact models, built from actual characterization data, can achieve high accuracy with minimal training data, providing a powerful tool for rapid device characterization, modelling and circuit level simulation.
papers.abstract_cn: 本工作提出了一种利用自编码器（autoencoder, AE）对 FinFET 进行高效建模的机器学习框架。我们首先校准了一个 BSIM-CMG 模型，以生成电流—电压（ID-VG）特性数据集。该数据用于训练一个自编码器，将完整 I-V 曲线压缩到低维潜在空间中，而该空间内在地编码了关键器件物理。一个关键创新是显式地将漏源电压（VDS）等参数作为输入特征，从而增强模型捕捉偏置依赖变化的能力。训练后的模型能够成功重构完整 I-V 曲线，并直接提取包括阈值电压（VTH）、亚阈值摆幅（SS）和峰值跨导（gm）在内的关键器件指标。该方法表明，基于实际表征数据构建的数据驱动紧凑模型能够以最少训练数据实现高精度，为快速器件表征、建模和电路级仿真提供了强有力工具。
papers.abstract_zh: 本工作提出了一种利用自编码器（autoencoder, AE）对 FinFET 进行高效建模的机器学习框架。我们首先校准了一个 BSIM-CMG 模型，以生成电流—电压（ID-VG）特性数据集。该数据用于训练一个自编码器，将完整 I-V 曲线压缩到低维潜在空间中，而该空间内在地编码了关键器件物理。一个关键创新是显式地将漏源电压（VDS）等参数作为输入特征，从而增强模型捕捉偏置依赖变化的能力。训练后的模型能够成功重构完整 I-V 曲线，并直接提取包括阈值电压（VTH）、亚阈值摆幅（SS）和峰值跨导（gm）在内的关键器件指标。该方法表明，基于实际表征数据构建的数据驱动紧凑模型能够以最少训练数据实现高精度，为快速器件表征、建模和电路级仿真提供了强有力工具。

papers.title: Solution-processable two-dimensional hexagonal copper indium selenide semiconductors
papers.summary: Nature Electronics, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01661-w Wafer-scale and air-stable semiconducting films of two-dimensional copper indium selenide can be made from monolayer ink deposition and annealing, creating transistors with an average mobility of 155 cm2 V−1 s−1 and a microprocessor containing over 100 devices.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026 年 6 月 24 日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01661-w。可通过单层墨水沉积和退火制备晶圆级且空气稳定的二维铜铟硒化物半导体薄膜，并由此制备平均迁移率为 155 cm2 V−1 s−1 的晶体管以及包含超过 100 个器件的微处理器。
papers.abstract_zh: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026 年 6 月 24 日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01661-w。可通过单层墨水沉积和退火制备晶圆级且空气稳定的二维铜铟硒化物半导体薄膜，并由此制备平均迁移率为 155 cm2 V−1 s−1 的晶体管以及包含超过 100 个器件的微处理器。

papers.title: Solid-state transcapacitor, a new gain element for logic, memory and interconnects
papers.summary: Today's transistors dictate the voltage and charge scales for both logic and memory. While AI systems are recognized to be limited by memory energy, the dominant share of the energy is expended in the intrachip interconnects whose voltage and charge scales are set by transistors. The energy scaling challenges of transistors can be attributed to simultaneously meeting high current density, high current/impedance modulation, and the inability to lower voltages. Hence, a new logic element that lowers the voltage and charge needs is a priority, not only for lowering logic power but also memory access power. Here, we propose a novel 3-terminal logic element for low energy computing, a solid-state transcapacitor (TCAP). A TCAP is a solid state displacement current modulator realized by a gate which controls the charge-voltage relationship of the channel. Unlike transistors, TCAPs eliminate the dissipative transport current, are not bound by the Boltzmann current modulation limit, and operate with displacement currents limited only by the polarization response and contact resistance. Hence, TCAP circuits may simultaneously overcome the voltage, current density, and current modulation limits of CMOS. We describe a solid state TCAP using a piezoelectric transcapacitor in which a gate-controlled stressor modulates the capacitance of a polar channel via electromechanical coupling. This device achieves inversion and gain, essential for logic, and is functionally equivalent to a 1T-1C memory cell, enabling dense memory. Using voltage scaling, capacitive energy recovery, and high polarization densities of polar materials, the logic based on TCAP offers a pathway to 100 fold lower energy consumption with a delay comparable to ultimately scaled CMOS devices. This approach provides a new potential pathway for low-energy computing beyond the limits of transistors using electro-mechanics and multiferroics.
papers.abstract_cn: 当今晶体管决定了逻辑和存储的电压与电荷尺度。尽管人们认识到 AI 系统受限于存储能耗，但能耗的主要部分消耗在片内互连中，而其电压和电荷尺度由晶体管设定。晶体管的能量缩放挑战可归因于需要同时满足高电流密度、高电流/阻抗调制以及无法降低电压。因此，能够降低电压和电荷需求的新型逻辑元件是优先事项，这不仅有助于降低逻辑功耗，也有助于降低存储访问功耗。本文提出了一种用于低能耗计算的新型三端逻辑元件，即固态跨电容器（solid-state transcapacitor, TCAP）。TCAP 是一种固态位移电流调制器，由栅极控制沟道的电荷—电压关系来实现。不同于晶体管，TCAP 消除了耗散性输运电流，不受 Boltzmann 电流调制极限约束，并以仅受极化响应和接触电阻限制的位移电流工作。因此，TCAP 电路可能同时克服 CMOS 的电压、电流密度和电流调制极限。我们描述了一种使用压电跨电容器的固态 TCAP，其中栅控应力源通过机电耦合调制极性沟道的电容。该器件实现了反相和增益，这是逻辑所必需的，并且在功能上等效于 1T-1C 存储单元，从而能够实现高密度存储。利用电压缩放、电容能量回收以及极性材料的高极化密度，基于 TCAP 的逻辑提供了一条可将能耗降低 100 倍、同时延迟可与极限缩放 CMOS 器件相当的路径。这种方法利用机电效应和多铁性，为超越晶体管极限的低能耗计算提供了一条新的潜在路径。

papers.title: Superconducting cavity probes sliding ferroelectricity in small-angle twisted WSe$_2$
papers.summary: Ferroelectricity is a property of materials that exhibit spontaneous charge polarization. Ferroelectricity in 2D materials is interesting because of their applications in memory devices and field-effect transistors. Recently, a new type of ferroelectricity, known as sliding ferroelectricity, has been discovered, in which parallel-stacked bilayers of hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) or transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) develop an out-of-plane electric polarization. In this work, we probe the polarization of small-angle parallel stacked WSe$_2$ by measuring its high-frequency AC response, achieved by embedding it into a half-wave superconducting coplanar waveguide cavity. We observe a hysteretic response in the capacitance of the stack and quality factor of the cavity, confirming ferroelectric switching in the system. Our results further reveal relaxation effects associated with ferroelectric domain-wall motion. This cavity-based technique has potential applications in probing domain-wall dynamics in a ferroelectric system at high frequencies.
papers.abstract_cn: 铁电性是材料表现出自发电荷极化的性质。二维材料中的铁电性因其在存储器件和场效应晶体管中的应用而受到关注。最近，一种称为滑移铁电性的新型铁电性被发现，其中六方氮化硼（hBN）或过渡金属二硫族化合物（TMDCs）的平行堆叠双层会产生面外电极化。在本工作中，我们通过测量小角度平行堆叠 WSe2 的高频交流响应来探测其极化，该测量通过将其嵌入半波超导共面波导腔中实现。我们在该堆叠的电容和腔的品质因数中观察到滞回响应，证实了该体系中的铁电翻转。我们的结果进一步揭示了与铁电畴壁运动相关的弛豫效应。这种基于腔的技术在高频探测铁电体系中的畴壁动力学方面具有潜在应用。
papers.abstract_zh: 铁电性是材料表现出自发电荷极化的性质。二维材料中的铁电性因其在存储器件和场效应晶体管中的应用而受到关注。最近，一种称为滑移铁电性的新型铁电性被发现，其中六方氮化硼（hBN）或过渡金属二硫族化合物（TMDCs）的平行堆叠双层会产生面外电极化。在本工作中，我们通过测量小角度平行堆叠 WSe2 的高频交流响应来探测其极化，该测量通过将其嵌入半波超导共面波导腔中实现。我们在该堆叠的电容和腔的品质因数中观察到滞回响应，证实了该体系中的铁电翻转。我们的结果进一步揭示了与铁电畴壁运动相关的弛豫效应。这种基于腔的技术在高频探测铁电体系中的畴壁动力学方面具有潜在应用。

Focus: 微电子器件与材料.
What to check: 器件性能、实验结果和潜在应用价值.
Context: Superconducting cavity probes sliding ferroelectricity in small-angle twisted WSe$_2$.

papers.title: Breaking symmetry to create a parallel-plate varactor dielectric with unparalleled microwave performance
papers.summary: Voltage-tunable capacitors (varactors) are key to microwave circuits. Tunable dielectric varactors outperform competing technologies in almost every relevant metric but usually suffer from high dielectric loss. In contrast, Ruddlesden-Popper (RPs) dielectric thin films have remarkably low microwave loss. Unfortunately, their crystallographic symmetry has until recently dictated an in-plane device structure, precluding the favorable out-of-plane parallel-plate varactor design for minimized size and maximized electric field in the tunable dielectric. Guided by theory, we report RPs akin to the widely studied tunable microwave dielectric BaxSr1-xTiO3. Assembling these same atoms into the first RP phase with broken out-of-plane symmetry, we achieve a low-loss, out-of-plane tunable dielectric thin film. The highest performing film, (ATiO3)nAO film with A = Ba0.45Sr0.55 and n = 8, unlocks a tenfold improvement in the figure of merit for out-of-plane tunable dielectrics at 10 GHz, paving the way for a new generation of tunable monolithic microwave integrated circuits.
papers.abstract_cn: 电压可调电容器（变容器）是微波电路的关键。可调介质变容器在几乎所有相关指标上都优于竞争技术，但通常存在较高介质损耗。相比之下，Ruddlesden-Popper（RP）介质薄膜具有极低的微波损耗。不幸的是，其晶体学对称性直到最近仍决定了只能采用面内器件结构，从而无法实现有利的面外平行板变容器设计，而这种设计可最小化尺寸并最大化可调介质中的电场。在理论指导下，我们报道了类似于被广泛研究的可调微波介质 BaxSr1-xTiO3 的 RP 材料。通过将这些相同原子组装成首个具有面外对称性破缺的 RP 相，我们实现了一种低损耗、面外可调介质薄膜。性能最佳的薄膜为 (ATiO3)nAO，其中 A = Ba0.45Sr0.55 且 n = 8，它使 10 GHz 下用于面外可调介质的品质因数提高了十倍，为新一代可调单片微波集成电路铺平了道路。
papers.abstract_zh: 电压可调电容器（变容器）是微波电路的关键。可调介质变容器在几乎所有相关指标上都优于竞争技术，但通常存在较高介质损耗。相比之下，Ruddlesden-Popper（RP）介质薄膜具有极低的微波损耗。不幸的是，其晶体学对称性直到最近仍决定了只能采用面内器件结构，从而无法实现有利的面外平行板变容器设计，而这种设计可最小化尺寸并最大化可调介质中的电场。在理论指导下，我们报道了类似于被广泛研究的可调微波介质 BaxSr1-xTiO3 的 RP 材料。通过将这些相同原子组装成首个具有面外对称性破缺的 RP 相，我们实现了一种低损耗、面外可调介质薄膜。性能最佳的薄膜为 (ATiO3)nAO，其中 A = Ba0.45Sr0.55 且 n = 8，它使 10 GHz 下用于面外可调介质的品质因数提高了十倍，为新一代可调单片微波集成电路铺平了道路。
